name: Halfreida the Illuminator - paladin of the sun -
description: Over the years, you’ve fought as a footman of the Sungod’s army, eventually rising up the ranks to stand in the personal army of the churche’s strongest paladin: Halfreida the Illuminator. It’s time to reclaim the Darklands. -Art by @G29_art-
creator: Bsndjdh
